component.name: ICD360S Mail Client
component.summary: Modern email client with mTLS auth, PGP, and threat detection

description.p: ICD360S Mail Client is a desktop email client built for users of the ICD360S e.V. mail infrastructure. It uses mutual-TLS for IMAP and SMTP authentication (no passwords sent over the wire), end-to-end PGP encryption (RFC 9580 — Ed25519 signing, X25519 encryption), and integrated phishing / threat detection on incoming mail.

ul.li: mTLS-only authentication — no IMAP/SMTP password ever leaves the device
Inline PDF and image preview via PDFium (no WebView dependency)
Phishing and DKIM/SPF/DMARC inspection per message
Self-hosted update channel with signed releases (no app-store dependency)

description.p: Sentry crash monitoring shipped to production. Windows startup fix series resolved.
